name: undo-redo
description: Undo is strictly LIFO and exact - a deliberate chain cross and its forced partner co-mark are ONE action, so a single undo reverses both together; redo re-applies through markColor, which re-derives the same partner deterministically; any fresh move clears the redo stack.

steps.note: red[9] (red 11), chained to yellow[9] (yellow 11) - auto-crosses yellow 11 too
undoes red[9] AND the forced yellow[9] co-mark together, as one atomic step
redo re-applies markColor(red,9) through the normal mutator, reproducing the identical auto co-mark on yellow[9]
a fresh move (green 12, not a chain space) clears the redo stack
nothing to redo - refused, state unchanged
LIFO: removes the green mark, not an older red one
penalties join the same history and clear redo
undoing a penalty restores the 5 points
